title: Respiratory Therapist
description: Mount Sinai is a leading health system with world-class clinical care, research, and education. You'll ensure accurate medication dispensing supporting patient-centered care.
responsibilities: Provide respiratory care and mechanical ventilation support
Perform pulmonary function testing and monitoring
Assist with airway management and intubation procedures
Educate patients on respiratory conditions and treatment
Maintain respiratory equipment and ensure safety

requirements.education: Associate's degree in Respiratory Therapy; RRT licensure required

benefits: Professional development and continuing education support
Employee assistance program (EAP) with mental health services
